artifact: Finds the tallest player height by comparing height to MAX(height).
sql:
SELECT player_name, height
FROM player
WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM player)
ORDER BY player_name;

raw_response.sql:
SELECT player_name, height
FROM player
WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM player)
ORDER BY player_name;
raw_response.artifact: Finds the tallest player height by comparing height to MAX(height).
